series_metadata.series_description: Record of grievance case files organized by case # and year for issue grievances, working-out-of-class grievance, and diciplinary grievances. May contain original grievance forms, (ADM-4403 and 4405), and supporting documentation including, but not limited to information on Step 1 and Step 2 filing an responses, copies of classification specifictions and position descriptions, grievance settlement or withdrawal information, arbitration decisions a n related correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office 5 years or until arbitration is complete., Electronic: Erase
